member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Common.Utils
member.summary: Utility code that is shared between the scan datalog classes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Common.Utils.DisabledPatternReadingResultValue
member.summary: Pattern value when reading actual pattern is disabled.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Common.Utils.ReadCurrentPatternValue(System.String,System.UInt32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.UInt64,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Read current pattern data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Common.Utils.GetDisabledReadPatternData(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Gets disabled pattern read result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Common.Utils.AllHaveFailingPins(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData})
member.summary: Indicates whether all FailureData in a list have failing pins or not.
member.returns: Returns true if all IFailureData have failing pins.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Common.Utils.GetPreviousLabelInfo(Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData)
member.summary: Gets previous label or default label name in case it hasn't.
member.param: Failure to get previous label name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Common.Utils.GetPreviousLabelInfo(Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Gets previous label or default label name in case it hasn't.
member.param: Failure to get previous label name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Common.Utils.GetDefaultLabel
member.summary: Gets default previous label information.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Common.Utils.PrintFailureDataToItuff(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Prints first failure data per pattern to Ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Common.Utils.GetExpandedRangesFromStringList(System.String)
member.summary: Resolve a range from a string to list of int. Example: input: "3-5,8,19,21-23" output: [3,4,5,8,19,21,22,23].

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PinMappingDescriptorFile
member.summary: Class that represents pinMappingInputFile Json input file structure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PinMappingDescriptorFile.PinNumbers
member.summary: Gets or sets the PinNumbers from the json file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PinMappingDescriptorFile.NotSSNBusPinsRelated
member.summary: Gets or sets the NotSSNBusPinsRelated from the json file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PinMappingDescriptorFile.SSNBusWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the SSNBusWidth, this will replace the PinNumbers in algorithm if specified, other PinNumbers is treated as bus size.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PinMappingDescriptorFile.PinsMapping
member.summary: Gets or sets the pinsMapping from the json file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PinMappingDescriptorFile.PinMapping
member.summary: Class that represents pinMapping section in Json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PinMappingDescriptorFile.PinMapping.DataPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the SSN data path from the json file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PinMappingDescriptorFile.PinMapping.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets the pinName from the json file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile
member.summary: Class that represents SsnDescriptorFile Json input file structure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.HryLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the HRYLength from the json file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.Patterns
member.summary: Gets or sets the Patterns list objects from the json file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.Pattern
member.summary: Class that represents Pattern object section in Json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.Pattern.PatternRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets PatternRegex.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.Pattern.Partitions
member.summary: Gets or sets the partition Partitions.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.Pattern.PacketSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the PacketSize from the json file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.Pattern.OutputPacketOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the OutputPacketOffset value from the json file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.Pattern.Partition
member.summary: Class that represents Partition section in Json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.Pattern.Partition.BitPositions
member.summary: Gets or sets BitPositions per partition.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.Pattern.Partition.HRYIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets PinRegex.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SsnDescriptorFile.Pattern.Partition.HRYPrint
member.summary: Gets or sets HRYPrint.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.DescriptorFileFactory
member.summary: Descriptor file factory to deserialize PinMapping config and initialize HRY file.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.DescriptorFileFactory.processedPinMapConfig
member.summary: Stored the deserialized configuration of the pin map file.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.DescriptorFileFactory.pinDataPath
member.summary: Map of pin name and data path.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HRYStatusSymbol
member.summary: Scan HRY status symbols.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HRYStatusSymbol.HRYFail
member.summary: HRYFail.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HRYStatusSymbol.HRYPass
member.summary: HRYPass.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HRYStatusSymbol.HRYUntested
member.summary: HRYUntested.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HRYStatusSymbol.HRYUnassigned
member.summary: HRYUnassigned.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HRYStatusSymbol.HRYUndefined
member.summary: HRYUndefined.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IDescriptorFileFactory
member.summary: Descriptor file factory interface.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IDescriptorFileFactory.CreateStreamingScanNetwork(System.String,System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.MappingMode,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates an Streaming Scan Network object.
member.param: Path of the file that describes the scan partitions.
Enable or disable HPTP algorithm mode.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHrySsnExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending the ScanHRYSSN Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHrySsnExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHrySsnExtensions.CustomPostProcessResults(Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHrySsnTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Called right after successful execution to provide the user the ability to post process exit port, scan fail results, and functional result.
member.param: The object for holding the exit port, scan fail results, and functional result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHrySsnExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.MatcherToKill
member.summary: Class intended to handle the regex pattern to kill.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.MatcherToKill.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of pattern regex to kill.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.MatcherToKill.ProcessPatterns(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Process the patterns to verify matches to kill.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.MatcherToKill.IsMatchToKill(System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Indicates if there is a match to kill.
member.param: Force to print the matching information to console as error.
member.returns: True when there is a match to kill, False otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PatternMatcher
member.summary: Pattern matcher that considers the pattern as a substring.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PatternMatcher.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PatternMatcher.IsMatch(System.String)
member.summary: Indicates whether the input file matches the regex pattern of the object.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod
member.summary: This class is intended to extract the HRY data for scan using SSN pattern multi partition with rotation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.SetUnassignedToUntestedPatternsMode
member.summary: Defines the different modes for the SetUnassignedToUntestedPatterns functionality.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.SetUnassignedToUntestedPatternsMode.DISABLED
member.summary: If the alarm port redirect is disabled, the untested partitions will be reported as passed with a 1 in the HRY result.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.SetUnassignedToUntestedPatternsMode.ENABLED
member.summary: If the alarm port redirect is enabled, the untested partitions will be reported as unassigned with a 9 in the HRY result.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.MappingMode
member.summary: Defines the mode of mapping, HPTP allow template to decode bit using HPTP formula, otherwise regular SSN decode formula.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.MappingMode.HPTP
member.summary: Use HPTP decode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.MappingMode.Normal
member.summary: Use regular SSN decode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.TotalFailCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets number of Patlist execution failures to capture per plist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.PerPatFailCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets number of Patlist execution failures to capture per pattern. The minimal number is 1.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.PatternsRegexesForKill
member.summary: Gets or sets PatternsRegexForKill. When one of the failing patterns, matching one of the regexes, test method Example: ".*pre.*, Pattern.*" will exit from dedicated port 4.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.PartitionsToIgnore
member.summary: Gets or sets PartitionsToIgnore. When one of the failing partition matches one of this paritions, the test method will print 9 on the HRY string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.ExpectedPartitionsStatuses
member.summary: Gets or sets ExpectedPartitionsStatuses. Comma-separated values of "PartitionName=0/1/8/9/X" (X - don't care.) Example: "EXE=1, FID=X, OOO=0".

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.SetUnassignedToUntestedPatterns
member.summary: Gets or sets SetUnassignedToUntestedPatterns. If TRUE the HRY will be overriden with UNASSIGNED for those partitions that not reported failures.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.HPTPMode
member.summary: Gets or sets HPTPMode. If ENABLE, test method shall use HPTP algorithm to decode the bit position. Otherwise, normal SSN algorithm is used.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.HRYInputFile
member.summary: Gets or sets HRY generation rules input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.PinMappingFile
member.summary: Gets or sets PinMapping input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.SharedStorageHRYExportKey
member.summary: Gets or sets SharedStorageHRYExportKey. This key will be used to export the HRY to shared storage under IP scope. The key will be reset in all cases at beginning of execution with empty string. In case of failure, nothing will be written afterwards.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.IfeObject
member.summary: Gets or sets The IFE object of type IScanHRYExtensions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.GenerateHry(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData})
member.summary: This function creates HRY string to be printed to ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.CalculateExitPort(Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHrySsnTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Calculates the exit port based on execute results. Port FailsMatchingKillPatternsRegexesPort should be resolved before FailsCapturedAndProcessedUnSuccessfullyPort, because patterns to kill feature has higher priority than not matching the expected partition statuses. FailsCapturedAndProcessedSuccessfullyPort is going to be outgoing port once the patterns to kill and expected statuses have been reviewed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHrySsnTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHrySsnTestInstanceResults.FunctionalResult
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether functional execution passes or fails.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHrySsnTestInstanceResults.ScanResults
member.summary: Gets or sets scan fail results.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SchemaValidator
member.summary: Schema validator.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SchemaValidator.ErrorList
member.summary: Gets or sets the error list from the schema validation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SchemaValidator.ValidateFile(System.String)
member.summary: Executes the validation for a file with the json schema. Adds validation errors to a common list.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SchemaValidator.GetSchemaValidator
member.summary: Returns a schema validation instance from a json schema file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SchemaValidator.GetSchemaFileContent
member.summary: Returns the content of a json schema file from the filesystem.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SchemaValidator.GetConfigurationContent(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the content of a json configuration file from the filesystem.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.SchemaValidator.GetErrorDetails
member.summary: Gets all the validation errors detail as a string.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHRYSsn.StreamingScanNetwork.DefaultPartitionMapper
member.summary: Default partition mapper class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHRYSsn.StreamingScanNetwork.ISsnPartitionMapper
member.summary: Interface of SSN partition mapper.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHRYSsn.StreamingScanNetwork.ISsnPartitionMapper.GetStarterBit(System.UInt64,System.UInt64,System.UInt64,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Get starter bit.
member.param: Output packet offset value from json file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHRYSsn.StreamingScanNetwork.ISsnPartitionMapper.FinalizePartitionPosition(System.UInt64,System.UInt64,System.Int32)
member.summary: Finalize partition position, by involving pin index, and packetSize.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HptpPartitionMapper
member.summary: Class that implements IStreamingScanNetwork.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HptpPartitionMapper.HptpVectorModifer
member.summary: GetHPTPVectorModifier will not works properly if it has change to other value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HptpPartitionMapper.GetHPTPVectorModifier(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Decision making function to determine HPTP vector use.
member.returns: Vector return act as modifier in formula calculation for to determine partition position.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IStreamingScanNetwork
member.summary: Interface for Streaming Scan Network object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IStreamingScanNetwork.GetDecodedData(System.Object@,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Process and map the fails considering the scan json input file.
member.param: List of fail data from the plist execution.
member.returns: A tuple of the resulted HRY datalog and the list of failing partitions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IStreamingScanNetwork.GetPartitionsPerPatternRegex
member.summary: Gets pattern regexes specified in json input file by partition.
member.returns: List of partitions by pattern regex.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IStreamingScanNetwork.GetPartitionIndexes
member.summary: Gets the partition indexes.
member.returns: Dictionary of partition name to partition's index in HRY.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.StreamingScanNetwork
member.summary: Class that implements IStreamingScanNetwork.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.StreamingScanNetwork.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.String},Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYSSNTestMethod.MappingMode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Pin numbers or SSN bus size.
Boolean check if HPTP mode enabled.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo
member.summary: This class will hold the mapping information that test method will need when proessing failures in run-time (execute) to determine for each failure, to which partition it belongs.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets the session context.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.BinaryMapping
member.summary: Gets or sets BinaryMapping. This will hold all the binary file content. Each captured defect will be translated to index in this bytes array, the value on this index will represent the 'hry index' that should be marked as failed. See wiki for more info.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.PartitionsResults
member.summary: Gets or sets PartitionsResults that represents the final result per partition. Partition is represented by its index in the HRY string, and the value is a symbol that reflect the status of this partition.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.BinaryFileSeekInfo
member.summary: Gets BinaryFileSeekInfo. This data structure will allow faster translation of defect to position in binary file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.PatternToPIDs
member.summary: Gets PatternToPIDs. This will tell for each pattern name, the list of partitions that it covers.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.AssignedIndexes
member.summary: Gets AdditionalUnassignedIndexes. This variable will tell which additional indexes to initialize with unassigned HRY symbol.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.ReadInputFile(System.String)
member.summary: This function reads hry .json input file, and prepares data to be used in run-time. This function can be overriden by user.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.ParseInputs(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. This function will read the HryMappingInfoInputFile file and will create data struture that test method will use during execute to process failures.
member.param: hry mapping info file, in json format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.GetInputFilesTimeStamps
member.summary: Return the time stamps of both input files.
member.returns: Tuple of 2 elements: first is the time stamp of mapping descriptor file, second is the time stamp of binary mapping file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.ValidatePlist(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Plist,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: This function will make sure all patterns in the plist has a representation in the json file, or specified in 'ignore list'.
member.param: patterns that not required to be in the .json file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.ProcessFailures(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},System.Boolean,Prime.TestMethods.Scan.RegexWrapper,Prime.TestMethods.Scan.RegexWrapper,Prime.TestMethods.ScanHRYStf.CompressedModeCache)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. This function will read the HryMappingInfoInputFile file and will create data struture that test method will use during execute to process failures.
member.param: hry mapping info file, in json format.
regex of patterns not to process.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.GenerateHRY
member.summary: GenerateHRY.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.GetSeekPositionInBinaryFile(System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: This method will return the seek position in the binary file that will hold the mapping to the HRY index. Note that 'cycle' is used to debug print only when no cycle range is found. Not needed for the actual mapping.
member.returns: Seek position in the binary file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.GetAllStartSeekPositions
member.summary: Returns all seek info per pattern and label.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.ValidateMappingFile(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo})
member.summary: It validates input files and updates relevant data structures that will be used during execution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.PatternLabelSeekInfo
member.summary: PatternLabelSeekInfo.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.PatternLabelSeekInfo.StartingPos
member.summary: Gets or Sets StartingPos.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.PatternLabelSeekInfo.CyclesRangesLo
member.summary: Gets or Sets CyclesRangesLo.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.HryStfMappingInfo.PatternLabelSeekInfo.CyclesRangesHi
member.summary: Gets or Sets CyclesRangesLo.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHRYStfExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending the ScanHRYStf Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHRYStfExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHRYStfExtensions.CustomPostProcessResults(Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Called right after successful execution to provide the user the ability to post process exit port, scan fail results, and functional result.
member.param: The object for holding the exit port, scan fail results, and functional result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHRYStfExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod
member.summary: PrimeScanHRYStf represents scan stf generation methodology.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.CompressedModeStatus
member.summary: Defines the On/Off for compressed mode support.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.CompressedModeStatus.Off
member.summary: Parameter is off.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.CompressedModeStatus.On
member.summary: Parameter is on.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.TotalFailCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets number of Patlist execution failures to capture per plist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.PerPatternFailCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets number of Patlist execution failures to capture per pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.PatternsNotToProcessForHRY
member.summary: Gets or sets comma-separated string of patterns regexes to exclude when processing failures for HRY. Those patterns will still be executed if they appear in plist, but their failures will not be processed. Entries for those patterns will be ignored if they appear in descriptor file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.PatternsRegexesForKill
member.summary: Gets or sets PatternsRegexForKill. When one of the failing patterns, matching one of the regexes, test method Example: ".*pre.*, Pattern.*" will exit from dedicated port 3.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.HryMappingDescriptorInputFile
member.summary: Gets or sets HRY mapping descriptor file. This file contents should define the way we map a specific failure to an actual HRY index. This file should be auto-generated by SPF-TOOL.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.HryMappingInputFile
member.summary: Gets or sets HRY mapping file. This should be a binary file, that contains mapping information that will be accessed in run-time, to determine for a specific failure, the HRY partition index. This file should be auto-generated by SPF-TOOL.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.SanityCheckInputFile
member.summary: Gets or sets Sanity check input file. This parameter is optional. But when not, test method will run in special mode. This special mode will read the input file, which holds expected mapping for each possible failure, and checks if test method methodology can produce the same expected mapping. Otherwise, there might be a problem in .json and .bin inputs. If all maps as expected test method pass verify. Otherwise if fails. User not allowed to run Execute with this parameter provided. Thus it will always fail from port (-1).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.CompressedMode
member.summary: Gets or sets whether DesignKill is On or Off.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.CacheLabelCyclesForCompressedMode
member.summary: This function will cache the cycles for each label, per pattern and domain. This will save time on execute.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.IsCaptureLimitsReached
member.summary: This function will return true if capture limits are reached. This is needed to know if the untested partitions are passing, or simply not tested due to capture limits.
member.returns: true if capture limits reached, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.PrintHRY
member.summary: This function prints the HRY to ituff and console.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYStfTestMethod.SetupFuncTest
member.summary: Setups the func test based in the execution mode (per pattern or plist).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.RegexWrapper
member.summary: Wrapper of the Regex class to consider substrings.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.RegexWrapper.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.RegexWrapper.IsMatch(System.String)
member.summary: Indicates whether the input file mathces the regex pattern of the object.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile
member.summary: Class that represents ScanHryStfDescriptorFile Json input file structure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PartitionToHryIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets PartitionsIds.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternsInfo
member.summary: Gets or sets PatternsInfo.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo
member.summary: PatternInfo.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo.PatternName
member.summary: Gets or sets PatternsInfo.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo.Partitions
member.summary: Gets or sets Partitions.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo.MappingsInfo
member.summary: Gets or sets MappingsInfo.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo.MappingInfo
member.summary: MappingInfo.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo.MappingInfo.Label
member.summary: Gets or sets Label.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo.MappingInfo.Cycles
member.summary: Gets or sets Cycles.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo.MappingInfo.Cycle
member.summary: Cycle.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo.MappingInfo.Cycle.FirstCycleFromLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets FirstCycleFromLabel.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfDescriptorFile.PatternInfo.MappingInfo.Cycle.LastCycleFromLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets Cycles.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfTestInstanceResults.FunctionalResult
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether functional execution passes or fails.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryStfTestInstanceResults.ScanResults
member.summary: Gets or sets scan fail results.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHRYExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending the ScanHRY Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHRYExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHRYExtensions.CustomPostProcessResults(Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Called right after successful execution to provide the user the ability to post process exit port, scan fail results, and functional result.
member.param: The object for holding the exit port, scan fail results, and functional result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanHRYExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod
member.summary: PrimeScanHRYTestMethod represents scan hry stf generation methodology.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.FirstFailPerPatternDatalogToItuffModes
member.summary: Defines the different modes for the FirstFailPerPattern functionality.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.FirstFailPerPatternDatalogToItuffModes.DISABLED
member.summary: If disabled, first fail data per pattern will not be printed to ituff.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.FirstFailPerPatternDatalogToItuffModes.ENABLED
member.summary: If enabled, first fail data per pattern will be printed to ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.TotalFailCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets number of Patlist execution failures to capture per plist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.PerPatFailCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets number of Patlist execution failures to capture per pattern. The minimal number is 1.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.PatternsRegexesForKill
member.summary: Gets or sets PatternsRegexForKill. When one of the failing patterns, matching one of the regexes, test method Example: ".*pre.*, Pattern.*" will exit from dedicated port 4.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.ExpectedPartitionsStatuses
member.summary: Gets or sets ExpectedPartitionsStatuses. Comma-separated values of "PartitionName=0/1/8/9/X" (X - don't care.) Example: "EXE=1, FID=X, OOO=0".

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.HRYInputFile
member.summary: Gets or sets HRY generation rules input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.SharedStorageHRYExportKey
member.summary: Gets or sets SharedStorageHRYExportKey. This key will be used to export the HRY to shared storage under IP scope. The key will be reset in all cases at beginning of execution with empty string. In case of failure, nothing will be written afterwards.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.FirstFailDataItuffPrint
member.summary: Gets or sets FirstFailDataItuffPrint. If ENABLED test method will print first fail data per pattern to ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.HryInputDataProcessed
member.summary: Gets or sets the HRY processed data from the input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.PatternsRegexesForKillCache
member.summary: Gets the patterns regex for the Kill.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.HryCommonAlgorithm
member.summary: Gets or sets the HRY Common algorithm.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.ReadInputFile
member.summary: This public function reads hry .json input file, and prepares data to be used in run-time. This function can be overriden by user.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.GenerateHRY(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData})
member.summary: This function creates HRY string to be printed to ituff. This function can be overriden by user.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanHRYTestMethod.PatternListFailPort
member.summary: This function will calculate the final exit port if the pattern list fails.
member.returns: Final exit port from pattern list fails.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm
member.summary: Class that represents scan hry common generation algorithm.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.DisabledPatternReadingResultValue
member.summary: This character represents DON'T CARE when comparing actual vs expected partitions statuses.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInputProcessed,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. This is the only allowed constructor that takes the already parsed hry input .json file.
member.param: Extra patterns to consider as part of the HRY input.
member.exception: Found [#] number of errors while building patterns mapping cache. Fail when a pattern in plist is not considered in the plist or extra pattern parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryStatusSymbol
member.summary: HryStatusSymbol.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryStatusSymbol.HRYFail
member.summary: HRYFail.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryStatusSymbol.HRYPass
member.summary: HRYPass.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryStatusSymbol.HRYUntested
member.summary: HRYUntested.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryStatusSymbol.HRYUnassigned
member.summary: HRYUnassigned.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.GenerateHRY(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},System.UInt64,System.String)
member.summary: This function creates HRY string to be printed to ituff based on captured fail data.
member.param: instance name for the ituff print.
member.returns: returns all results in HryGenerationResults var which contains raw hry, items to print to ituff, failing patterns and partitions statuses.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.CaptureLimitsReached(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},System.UInt64)
member.summary: This function will return true if capture limits are reached. This is needed to know if the untested partitions are passing, or simply not tested due to capture limits.
member.returns: true if capture limits reached, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.GetInitialHRYString(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},System.UInt64)
member.summary: This will return the initial HRY string. Taking into account the HRY string length and unassigned partitions.
member.returns: Two item tuple where the first item is the string to print to ituff and second is a status per partition dictionary.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryGenerationResults
member.summary: This class contains all items related to HRY generation: raw HRY string, data to print to ituff, status per partition and failing patterns.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryGenerationResults.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Constructor.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryGenerationResults.RawHRY
member.summary: Gets or sets raw hry.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryGenerationResults.ItemsToPrintToItuff
member.summary: Gets or sets items to print to ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryGenerationResults.StatusPerPartition
member.summary: Gets or sets status per partition.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryGenerationResults.FailingPatterns
member.summary: Gets or sets failing patterns.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryCommonAlgorithm.HryGenerationResults.Clear
member.summary: Clears data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput
member.summary: Class that represents HRYInputFile Json input file structure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.HryLength
member.summary: Gets or sets HryLength.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.GroupCount
member.summary: Gets or sets GroupCount.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Patterns
member.summary: Gets or sets Patterns.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern
member.summary: Class that represents Pattern section in Json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.PatternRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets PatternRegex.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Groups
member.summary: Gets or sets Groups.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group
member.summary: Class that represents Group section in Json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.GroupNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets GroupNumber.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets Pins.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.CompareTo(System.Object)
member.summary: Comparer for Group.
member.param: Right Group Object to compare to.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.Pin
member.summary: Class that represents Pin section in Json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.Pin.PinRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets PinRegex.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.Pin.Shifts
member.summary: Gets or sets Shifts.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.Pin.Shift
member.summary: Class that represents Shift section in Json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.Pin.Shift.ShiftStart
member.summary: Gets or sets ShiftStart.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.Pin.Shift.ShiftEnd
member.summary: Gets or sets ShiftEnd.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.Pin.Shift.HryIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets HRYIndex.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.Pin.Shift.HryPrint
member.summary: Gets or sets HRYPrint.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInput.Pattern.Group.Pin.Shift.CompareTo(System.Object)
member.summary: Comparer for Shift.
member.param: Right Shift Object to compare to.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInputProcessed
member.summary: Class that represents processed data from ScanHryInput class to optimize data access in Execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInputProcessed.HryInputData
member.summary: Gets or sets HryInputData. This is the parsed data from .json file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInputProcessed.UnassignedPartitionsIndexes
member.summary: Gets or sets UnassignedPartitions. This will hold the partition indexes that is not covered by any patterns/group/pin/range combination.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInputProcessed.PartitionsWithNoMatchingPatterns
member.summary: Gets or sets PartitionsWithNoMatchingPatterns. Those partitions has no matching patterns in the provided plist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInputProcessed.HRYIndexToPartitionName
member.summary: Gets or sets HRYIndexToPartitionName.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInputProcessed.ProcessData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. This constructor parse and process the data given in the .json file. The purpose of the processed data is to optimize calculation in Execute() time.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInputProcessed.PopulateData(System.String)
member.summary: This private function finds the partitions indexes that are not covered in by any patterns/group/pin/range combination. The superset of the partition indexes is actually all number between 0 and HryLength. HryLength is a field specified by user in .json input file. The function argument "plistName" is used to identify patterns regexes that matches 0 patterns in the plist. Those will be marked with 9 (unassigned).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryInputProcessed.SortData
member.summary: This private function sorts groups and shifts to enable faster access in Execute() time. groups are sorted based on simple int comparison function (low->high). shifts are sorted based on descending range comparison. (e.g. (1,4), (5,6), (9,11)).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryTestInstanceResults.FunctionalResult
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether functional execution passes or fails.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanHryTestInstanceResults.ScanResults
member.summary: Gets or sets scan fail results.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.VerifyDataStructure
member.summary: The Verify data structure to be populated during VerifyOffline() and consumed later during Init().

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanSPOFIExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending the ScanSPOFI Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanSPOFIExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanSPOFIExtensions.CustomPostProcessResults(Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Called right after successful execution to provide the user the ability to post process exit port, scan fail results, and functional result.
member.param: The object for holding the exit port, scan fail results, and functional result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.IScanSPOFIExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Spofi.PatternMatcher
member.summary: Pattern matcher that considers the pattern as a substring.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Spofi.PatternMatcher.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.Spofi.PatternMatcher.IsMatch(System.String)
member.summary: Indicates whether the input file matches the regex pattern of the object.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PatternToKillMatcher
member.summary: Class intended to handle the regex pattern to kill.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PatternToKillMatcher.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of pattern regex to kill.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PatternToKillMatcher.ProcessPatterns(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Process the patterns to verify matches to kill.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PatternToKillMatcher.IsMatchToKill(System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Indicates if there is a match to kill.
member.param: Force to print the matching information to console as error.
member.returns: True when there is a match to kill, False otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSPOFI.PlistData
member.summary: Plist data class use to hold test method patlist and pattern information.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSPOFI.PlistData.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSPOFI.PlistData.Patlist
member.summary: Gets patlist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSPOFI.PlistData.UniquePatternsInPlist
member.summary: Gets unique patterns in plist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSPOFI.PlistData.AmblesPatternsInPlist
member.summary: Gets PatternsInPlist amblesPatternsInPlist.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod
member.summary: PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod represents scan spofi generation methodology.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.TotalFailCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets number of Patlist execution failures to capture per plist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.PerPatternFailCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets number of Patlist execution failures to capture per pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.PatternsRegexesForKill
member.summary: Gets or sets PatternsRegexForKill. When one of the failing patterns, matching one of the regexes, test method will exit from dedicated port 2. Example: ".*pre.*, Pattern.*".

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.EngineeringSpofiOutputFolderPath
member.summary: Gets or sets EngineeringSpofiOutputFilePath. Default value is empty string which will make SPOFI prints go to scan datalog file. If value is not empty, a new file will be created, and the SPOFI prints goes into this file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.FuncTest
member.summary: Gets functional object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.PrintSpofiToEngineeringFile(Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ISpoFiFormat)
member.summary: This method prints Spofi to engineering file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.SetupFunctionalTest
member.summary: Setups the func test based in the execution mode (per pattern or plist).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.ExecuteFuncTest(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData}@)
member.summary: Executes the func test by calling the relevant function based on execution mode (per pattern or plist).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.PrimeScanSPOFITestMethod.GetSPOFIFormat(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData})
member.summary: Generate SPOFI data to be printed to ituff.
member.param: List of scan failure data to be printed.
member.returns: ISpofiFormat Datalog item which holds formatted string.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.IScanDatalogHelper
member.summary: Interface of Scan datalog helper.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.IScanDatalogHelper.HasInformationToDatalog
member.summary: Indicates whether object has information to datalog.
member.returns: True if has information to datalog.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.IScanDatalogHelper.IsCompressedMode
member.summary: Indicates whether pattern is in compressed mode or not.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.IScanDatalogHelper.PopulateSpofiFormat(Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.ISpoFiFormat)
member.summary: Populates spofi format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.IScanDatalogHelper.SetReadPatternData(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Indicates whether current pattern data will be value or not.
member.param: True to value current pattern data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.ScanDatalogFactory
member.summary: Scan Datalog Factory.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.ScanDatalogFactory.Create(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates an object of IScanDatalogHelper interface.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.ScanDatalogs.ScanCompressedDatalog
member.summary: Scan datalog helper for compress pattern mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.ScanDatalogs.ScanCompressedDatalog.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.ScanDatalogs.ScanUncompressedDatalog
member.summary: Scan datalog helper for un-compress pattern mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.ScanDatalogs.ScanUncompressedDatalog.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanDatalogHelpers.ScanDatalogs.ScanUncompressedDatalog.ExtractLabelData(System.String)
member.summary: This function extract label and chain length from a scan label.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiDatalogFormatter
member.summary: Class that represents SPOFI formatter for generating string to be printed to ScanFI datalog. Important Note: The format is decided by "Component Debug" and by the tools that are parsing ScanFI datalog stream.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiDatalogFormatter.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets the session context.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiDatalogFormatter.UniquePatternsInPlist
member.summary: Gets or sets this is used in run time to log patterns that has no failures.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiDatalogFormatter.AmblesPatternsInPlist
member.summary: Gets or sets PatternsInPlist amblesPatternsInPlist.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiDatalogFormatter.GetSPOFIFormat(Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSPOFI.PlistData,System.UInt64,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Class that represents SPOFI formatter for generating string to be printed to ScanFI datalog.
member.param: plist data object to parse information from test method.
True to read current pattern data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiDatalogFormatter.RestructureFailsPerPattern(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData})
member.summary: This function restructures the scan fails to be arranged by pattern name for printing purposes.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiDatalogFormatter.ProcessFailsInfo(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}@)
member.summary: This function prepares failures information to be printed to ScanFI datalog.

member.summary: Filter out fail and amble patterns, to form pass patterns.

member.summary: Populate passing pattern into spofi datalog.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiTestInstanceResults.FunctionalResult
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether functional execution passes or fails.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scan.ScanSpofiTestInstanceResults.ScanResults
member.summary: Gets or sets scan fail results.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.ScanHRYStf.CompressedModeCache
member.summary: This class represents the cache for label cycles which is used in compressed mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.ScanHRYStf.CompressedModeCache.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: domains used for compressed mode. ON new prime this is not needed.

members.member:
This will return the cycle for a given pattern, domain and label.
pattern. domain. label. /// extracted label. cycle. true if found, false otherwise.
